bird.name: Campbell shag
bird.summary: The Campbell shag (Leucocarbo campbelli), also known as the Campbell Island shag, is a species of bird in the family Phalacrocoracidae. It…

relations.subject: Campbell shag
relations.evidence: A report on seabird breeding in the same region as Campbell Island for the Ornithological Society of New Zealand stated that seabirds are among the most threatened birds and this will worsen due to climate change and pollution
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
